chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 1376 of 2022 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge For non-prosecution 07.09.2023 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Korai, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press this petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
